sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14169" key="a)pou/rhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπούρ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n14169.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">urine passed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0643.tlg001:30:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.Lond.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
